title: Resolve PersonaKit before tool selection
goal: Use PersonaKit MCP to resolve the active contract before choosing any host-local skills or tools.

steps.text: Read the PersonaKit catalog start resource.
Resolve or recommend the correct session.
Resolve the contract and verify requested skills against authorization.
Trace the session when provenance matters.
Stop for review if any required skill is unauthorized or undeclared.

acceptanceCriteria: Contract resolution happens before host-local tool selection
MCP is treated as read-only context
Unauthorized capability needs cause a stop
The final answer names the resolved session and relevant constraints
